name: sommelier
description: Verification-gated orchestration skills — turn a big task into a PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, pair each with the cheapest model tier that passes, and gate merges on re-measured evidence. Self-tested across five rounds, every round published: the verification rule beats a placebo at catching certified bugs (0%->44-58%, hidden-pytest, p<=1e-4), tier-routing runs ~19% cheaper than an all-Opus workflow, and parallel fan-out is ~1.8x slower on small tasks (bring it only at scale).
